drifted.spec_text: Three usage modes: declarative, fluent, and mixed (positional + config)
drifted.actual: Only declarative (config object) and fluent (setter methods). No mixed mode with positional args.

drifted.spec_text: Setters mutate the NodeData fields and return the same object
drifted.actual: Setters create a new object (immutable pattern: { ...config, field: newValue })

drifted.spec_text: .from() accepts shorthand string values, numbers, and booleans
drifted.actual: Strings and objects accepted; number/boolean shorthand resolution incomplete

drifted.spec_text: .from() returns FromNode with ergonomic setters accepting FromInput types
drifted.actual: Returns same fluent node type as regular factory

drifted.spec_text: .from() resolution logic generated inline per factory
drifted.actual: Uses shared resolver registry with IIFE bodies keyed by deduped signatures

drifted.spec_text: Rendered output is syntactically valid when parsed by tree-sitter
drifted.actual: Render engine joins all parts with single spaces, producing 'name ( params )' instead of 'name(params)'

drifted.spec_text: 5-level-deep AST fragment in under 10 lines of factory code
drifted.actual: No positional args or single-field compression makes deeply nested construction verbose

drifted.spec_text: Regenerating from unchanged grammar produces byte-identical output
drifted.actual: Not verified — depends on Map iteration order and signature interning consistency

drifted.spec_text: Central representation is NodeElement[] (field, token, child, choice) ordered sequence
drifted.actual: Uses FieldModel[] + ChildrenModel + EnrichedRule — no NodeElement sequence

drifted.spec_text: Each field carries FieldTypeClass with leafTypes, branchTypes, anonTokens, etc.
drifted.actual: Fields store kinds: string[] / HydratedNodeModel[], projections computed on demand

specs.title: Grammar Model Pipeline Refactoring

drifted.spec_text: BranchModel has members: NodeMember[]. Step 6 is applyAllMembers(models) — walks rules to produce ordered NodeMember[] for structural models.
drifted.actual: NodeMember type, applyAllMembers, and all member infrastructure intentionally removed. EnrichedRule retained on models; rules emitter reads it directly.

drifted.spec_text: Pipeline has 13 steps with step 6 = Apply Members
drifted.actual: Pipeline has 12 steps — step 6 removed, renumbered

not_implemented: Context-aware semantic alias inference (deferred per spec)

conflicts.description: Spec 002 proposes NodeElement sequences; spec 003 proposes NodeMember sequences. Neither implemented — codebase uses EnrichedRule directly. Spec 003 supersedes 002.
Spec 003 describes NodeMember[] on structural models. Implementation intentionally removed members, relying on EnrichedRule for template generation.
FR-006 says setters mutate and return same object. Implementation returns new objects (immutable pattern).
